channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-351] Kernel update [RHEL6 U1 2.6.32-131.0.15]
item.description:
Few days ago RedHat is released a first update on RHEL6 distro.
So lustre want to suport that kernel.

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Integrated in lustre-master » x86_64,server,el5,ofa #154
LU-351 RHEL6 U1 support.

Oleg Drokin : 1f61446d624c811e15c0d6e76c4a047ffe3e137e

  • lustre/kernel_patches/targets/2.6-rhel6.target.in

LU-351 RHEL6 U1 support.

Oleg Drokin : 1f61446d624c811e15c0d6e76c4a047ffe3e137e
Files :

  • lustre/kernel_patches/patches/raid5-mmp-unplug-dev-rhel6.patch

  • libcfs/libcfs/linux/linux-debug.c
  • ldiskfs/kernel_patches/series/ldiskfs-2.6-rhel6.series

Now we have a 6.1 baseline on master. Let's track any modifications under separate tickets to prevent this ticket becoming as huge as LU-73 did. LLNL already have opened a number of tickets specific to RHEL6.1
Landed for 2.1

LU-351 RHEL6 U1 support.

  • lustre/kernel_patches/patches/dev_read_only-2.6.32-rhel6.patch
Hello, Shadow. Long time no see. Do you mind i update this patch?
Hi, Mike, Many thanks for the help.
I will update patch shortly.

I have re-triggered the verification build after adding the build deps to the EL6 builders. Unfortunately, it seems that the patch breaks builds on SLES11 and Ubuntu10.04:
http://newbuild.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/arch=x86_64,build_type=client,distro=sles11,ib_stack=inkernel/664/consoleFull
http://newbuild.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/arch=x86_64,build_type=client,distro=ubuntu1004,ib_stack=inkernel/664/consoleFull
Patch http://review.whamcloud.com/#change,584

http://newbuild.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/589/arch=x86_64,build_type=server,distro=el6,ib_stack=inkernel/console

Looks like we need update rhel6 osimage for update 1.

+++ /usr/bin/rpmbuild -ba --without kabichk --with firmware --target x86_64 --with baseonly --define '_topdir /var/lib/jenkins/workspace/lustre-reviews/arch/x86_64/build_type/server/distro/el6/ib_stack/inkernel/BUILD' --define 'buildid _lustre.g61cd973' --define '_tmppath /var/tmp' /var/lib/jenkins/workspace/lustre-reviews/arch/x86_64/build_type/server
/distro/el6/ib_stack/inkernel/BUILD/SPECS/kernel.spec
error: Failed build dependencies:
	xmlto is needed by kernel-2.6.32-131.0.15.el6_lustre.g61cd973.x86_64
	asciidoc is needed by kernel-2.6.32-131.0.15.el6_lustre.g61cd973.x86_64
	newt-devel is needed by kernel-2.6.32-131.0.15.el6_lustre.g61cd973.x86_64
	perl(ExtUtils::Embed) is needed by kernel-2.6.32-131.0.15.el6_lustre.g61cd973.x86_64
Building target platforms: x86_64
Building for target x86_64
Thanks Shadow.
